steps.title: Use the range of styles
steps.content: The sentence says the collection disproves a misconception because the artists use a range of styles: traditional, modernist, abstract expressionist, and blended. The blank should describe the mistaken idea that Native art is all the same.

steps.title: Reject unrelated descriptions
steps.content:
• Choice A means not disputed, which is unrelated to the range of styles.
  • Choice B means focused on individuals, but the passage emphasizes stylistic variety.
  • Choice C means abstract or conceptual, not uniform in style.
The remaining choice means uniform or all alike. The answer is D.
